name: Fig Stuffed Baked Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the apples and peel about one-third of the way down.
2. Mix together the cinnamon, lemon peel, chopped figs, and 2 tablespoons of orange juice.
3. Stuff the center of each apple with the fig mixture using a small spoon.
4. Cover the tops of the apples with the fig mixture.
5. Arrange the stuffed apples in a shallow baking dish.
6. Pour the remaining orange juice over the apples.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 60 minutes, basting occasionally with orange juice, until the apples are tender.
